_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to coordinate with Sr Leaders of an Org. to ensure shared responsibility for supporting Org. mission/business functions using external providers of systems, services and apps receives visibility and is elevated to the appropriate decision-making authorities
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.519), DG-S-003 (DG, cosine: 0.503).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.485). Shared vocabulary: [business]. DCWF-only terms [ability, appropriate, apps, authorities, coordinate, decision] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, communication, complex] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.843, R=0.864). R exceeds P by 0.022 — the WIDAI KSA's 16 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 36 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to coordinate with Sr Leaders of an Org. to ensure shared responsibility" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 ≈ STS 0.485 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [business] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [business]. DCWF-only: [ability, appropriate, apps, authorities, coordinate, decision]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, communication, complex].
